name: python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth
title: python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Bluetooth module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Bluetooth module
Qt Bluetooth API provides connectivity between Bluetooth enabled devices.
.
This package contains the QtBluetooth module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth because Python bindings for Qt 6 Bluetooth module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtbluetooth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
